title: BloodMark
description: Marks give you permanent effects based on level
body:
---

# 🩸 Blood Marks

**High-risk PvP progression with real consequences.**

Blood Marks turns *player-vs-player* deaths into a tangible power economy. Kill players, collect their Blood Marks, consume them to grow stronger—and become a glowing, hunted target. Environmental deaths (lava, mobs, void, fall, etc.) do **not** drop marks or reduce levels.

Designed for hardcore SMPs and PvP-focused servers, Blood Marks makes power visible and dangerous.

---

## ⚔️ Gameplay Overview

* Players have a **Blood Level** from **-7 to +7**
* **PvP deaths reduce level by 1** and drop a Blood Mark
* **Environmental deaths do not drop marks**
* Consume Blood Marks to gain levels and buffs
* High-level players are broadcast to the server and can glow

---

## 🧬 Scaling Effects

### 🔴 Positive Levels

* Haste, Speed, Strength, Resistance
* Increased mobility and combat dominance
* Level 7 players **glow permanently**

### ⚫ Negative Levels

* Weakness, Slowness, Mining Fatigue
* Penalizes repeated deaths

---

## 📢 Bounty Leak System

High-level players cannot hide:

* **Level 6** → Location broadcast every **45 minutes**
* **Level 7** → Location broadcast every **30 minutes**
* Broadcast includes **player name, level, and coordinates**

---

## 🩸 Blood Mark Item

* Custom-named item (Red Dye)
* Right-click to consume
* Fire & lava proof
* Glows when dropped
* Persistent data tagged (cannot be spoofed)
* Optional resource-pack ready (CustomModelData)

---

## 🔨 Crafting Recipe

* Diamond Blocks (Corners)
* Netherite Ingots (Sides)
* Netherite Blocks (Center)
---
